title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
